description_long: This is a wooden bed with a simple, rustic design, featuring a solid rectangular frame and four thick, square corner posts. The headboard and footboard are both present, each with a slightly curved top edge and robust construction, giving the bed a sturdy appearance. The sleeping surface consists of wide, flat wooden planks, and there is no visible mattress or bedding on top. The wood grain texture is visible throughout, with a warm, reddish-brown finish that highlights the natural material. The bed sits low to the ground, supported by the four posts, and has no visible under-bed storage or decorative elements. Its straightforward construction and durable materials make it suitable for outdoor or utilitarian urban settings.
description: A sturdy, rustic wooden bed with thick posts, curved headboard and footboard, and a bare plank sleeping surface in a reddish-brown finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved headboard and two prominent front posts.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the flat plank surface and both headboard and footboard, with all four posts visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the curved footboard and rear posts, mirroring the headboard's design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plank surface and both end boards.
